summary: Konekt B2B Platform Batch 5 (Iteration 340) - Micro-interactions CSS, Service Card Subcategory Fix, Active Country Config API, Vendor-Order Routing Foundations. Backend APIs 77% pass rate (10/13). All frontend features verified.

minor.issue: Returns 403 without authentication - expected behavior for protected endpoint

critical_code_review_comments: CSS micro-interactions properly implemented in index.css lines 325-388: card-lift, btn-press, stagger-enter, skeleton-shimmer
KPI cards in AdminDashboardV2.jsx line 33 correctly use card-lift class for hover animation
Service cards in ServiceCardsSection.jsx line 139 correctly use card-lift class
Active country config API returns correct Tanzania defaults: TZS currency, 18% VAT, +255 phone prefix
Button press feedback auto-applies to all buttons with data-testid attribute via CSS selector

success_rate.backend: 77% (10/13 passed - 3 failures are expected 403 for protected endpoints)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All batch 5 features verified: 1) Micro-interactions CSS in index.css lines 325-388 includes card-lift (hover translateY -2px + shadow), btn-press (active scale 0.97), stagger-enter (list entrance animation), skeleton-shimmer (loading pulse). 2) Service cards at /services page show categories with subcategories - clicking expands to show sub-services with 'View Service' and 'Request Quote' buttons. Categories without subcategories show 'Request Quote' button directly. 3) GET /api/admin/active-country-config returns Tanzania defaults: code=TZ, currency=TZS, vat_rate=18, phone_prefix=+255. 4) Vendor Assignments page at /admin/vendor-assignments shows vendor-category assignments with 'Assign Vendor' button. 5) Feedback Inbox at /admin/feedback-inbox shows stats (NEW/IN PROGRESS/RESOLVED/TOTAL) and feedback items with categories. 6) Quote creation at /admin/quotes/new shows LIVE PREVIEW with CanonicalDocumentRenderer including branded header, bank transfer details, and authorized by section. 7) Settings Hub at /admin/settings-hub has tabs for Number & Currency, Countries & Markets, Launch Controls, Branding, etc.

micro_interactions_css.details: CSS classes in index.css: card-lift (hover lift animation), btn-press (button press feedback), stagger-enter (list entrance animation), skeleton-shimmer (loading pulse). Button press auto-applies to all buttons with data-testid.

service_card_subcategory_fix.details: Service cards at /services show categories with subcategories. ServiceCardsSection.jsx lines 161-190 handle both cases: categories with subcategories show sub-items, categories without show 'Request Quote' button.

dashboard_kpi_card_lift.details: Admin dashboard KPI cards have card-lift class (AdminDashboardV2.jsx line 33). Found 7 elements with card-lift class on dashboard.

active_country_config_api.details: GET /api/admin/active-country-config returns: code=TZ, name=Tanzania, currency=TZS, currency_symbol=TSh, vat_rate=18.0, phone_prefix=+255, doc_prefix_code=TZ, timezone=Africa/Dar_es_Salaam

feedback_widget.details: Help & Feedback button visible in bottom-left corner on all pages (marketplace, admin dashboard, settings hub).

settings_hub_tabs.details: Settings Hub at /admin/settings-hub shows tabs: Profile, Payment Details, Document Branding, Document Numbering, Countries & Markets, Document Footer, Document Template, Number & Currency, Notifications, Email Notifications, Report Delivery, Pricing Tiers, Distribution Rules, Sales & Commission, Payout Settings, Launch Controls, Affiliate Policy, Vendor Policy, Partner Config, Operational Rules, Performance Targets.

vendor_assignments_page.details: Vendor Assignments page at /admin/vendor-assignments loads correctly. Shows 'Vendor-Category Assignments' with 'Assign Vendor' button and existing assignments.

feedback_inbox_page.details: Feedback Inbox at /admin/feedback-inbox shows stats (4 NEW, 0 IN PROGRESS, 1 RESOLVED, 5 TOTAL) and feedback items with categories (Bug/Error, Feature Request, General Feedback).

quote_creation_preview.details: Quote creation at /admin/quotes/new shows LIVE PREVIEW with CanonicalDocumentRenderer. Preview includes: QUOTATION header with DRAFT badge, FROM/PREPARED FOR/DETAILS sections, line items table, Bank Transfer Details, Authorized By with signature, Company Stamp placeholder.
